title: [MTR3/4]JR Trains Pack
description: This Resource Pack adds Japanese Railway Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![E231 series](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3502ae1e7556d15b8f6f22ce34db11372f5bb851_0.webp)

## JR Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway

* [Working Display version Link](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr4jr-trains-pack-with-working-displays) - by ao_sankaku

### Introduction

This resource pack adds Japanese Railways trains for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway Mod** (MTR3, MTR4) and **Nemo's Transit Expansion** for MTR3 version (NTE)

Compatible with [1067mm Railway RP ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr1067mm_rail)

### Terms & Disclaimer
This RP can be applied manually in the 'Resource Packs' page in the same way that other RPs are applied after Installing Required Mods and Addons.

Before using, please set the JVM arguments to 6GB or higher. It may take some time to load this RP.

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars (information could be found in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

for more information, check readme inside the pack.

### Contents
* JR 211/415 Series (Shonan livery, _Boso, Nagano, 415-Kyushu livery for MTR3 Version_)
* JR Kiha 54 Series
* JR 203 Series
* JR E231-500 Series (Yamanote, Chuo-Sobu livery)
